data.name: Performance Evaluation of ROS2-DDS middleware implementations facilitating Cooperative Driving in Autonomous Vehicle

data.description: Performance Evaluation of ROS2-DDS middleware implementations facilitating Cooperative Driving in Autonomous Vehicle is evaluated on ROS 2 Middleware.
Performance Evaluation of ROS2-DDS middleware implementations facilitating Cooperative Driving in Autonomous Vehicle discusses Real-time control framework.
Performance Evaluation of ROS2-DDS middleware implementations facilitating Cooperative Driving in Autonomous Vehicle discusses Hardware/software in the loop testing (HIL/SIL).
